hero.title: About Arohio
hero.lead: We build AI tools that make documents accessible for everyone—fast, consistent, and WCAG-compliant.
hero.body: From auto-generated alt text to PDF/UA tagging and QA, Arohio helps teams deliver inclusive experiences at scale without slowing down delivery.

image.alt: Abstract network of connected nodes symbolizing automation

sections.title: Our Vision
sections.subtitle: A world where content is accessible by defau
bullets: Make accessibility effortless across documents and workflows.
Deliver clarity for readers using assistive technologies.
Champion openness: share learnings with the community.
Champion openness: share learnings with the community.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.subtitle: Equip teams with intuitive tools that combine accessibility and automation.
bullets: Turn complex PDFs into WCAG & PDF/UA-ready outputs.
Blend AI speed with expert review and quality gates.
Integrate with existing DMS/LMS and team workflows.

sections.title: Our Core Values
sections.subtitle: Principles that guide how we build Arohio and serve our customers.

cards.title: Inclusivity
cards.description: We design for everyone. Accessibility is baked into the roadmap, research, and reviews—not added at the end.

cards.title: Innovation
cards.description: We keep pushing accuracy, speed, and reliability with research-driven iteration and practical engineering.

cards.title: Integrity
cards.description: We earn trust through transparency and responsible data practices. Security is the default.

cards.title: Collaboration
cards.description: We build with customers and the community to solve the right problems.

cards.title: Excellence
cards.description: We set a high bar for craft and keep refining.

cards.title: Empathy
cards.description: We listen first so the product is helpful, not just smart.

sections.title: Our Expertise in Accessibility & Automation
sections.body: We combine modern vision–language models with practical workflows to deliver accessible, high-quality documents at scale.
bullets: Scalable extraction, enrichment, and QA gating
